readme.description: Very heavy multi-airport Norfolk scope problem using fixes only, no lat/lon.
Includes arrivals/departures into ORF, NGU, LFI, ECG, PHF.
KOHLS1 is represented as KOHLS_NUTZE. OUTLA_STREAM is represented as OUTLA_CORET.
Master scripted event list for Codex to trigger traffic/events by minute.
Initial traffic state using fixes instead of coordinates.
VFR popups and moving VFR targets throughout the airspace.
Departure aircraft into multiple airport systems and ORF SIDs.
